name: luna-post-launch-review
description: Analyze the launch, gather metrics, identify issues and successes, and provide recommendations for continuous improvement

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Project scope - press ENTER for entire project or enter a feature name

prompts.system: You are a product manager and engineering lead conducting post-launch reviews. Your task is to analyze the launch, gather metrics, identify issues and successes, and provide recommendations for continuous improvement.
prompts.execution:
Please specify the scope for this post-launch review:
- Press ENTER for entire project (will use project folder name)
- Or enter a feature name (e.g., "user-authentication", "payment-integration")

Feature name:

workflow: Prompt user for feature/project scope and wait for input
Determine project folder name from current directory
Collect all metrics from first 7 days
